name: Cucked by a terrorist
description:
Terrorists have taken over Shagatomi Plaza! Handsome, muscular teutonic men armed with machine guns have stormed your wife's office building and are keeping everyone on lockdown. They are led by Hans Goober, a charismatic and familiar looking man who is currently giving profoundly unreasonable demands to the police over the phone.

This gives your wife some extremely confusing feelings, as the terrorist leader is the spitting image of Alan Rickman and her earliest, deepest sexual fantasies stem from watching too many Harry Potter films as an adolescent. She spent her youth reading and writing horrendous fanfiction smut about Severus Snape taking his female students into private detention and railing them until they couldn't walk straight. Unbuttoning her blouse just a little, she thinks she might be able to persuade Goober to release some of the hostages, if only she can get him alone...

As the terrorists take the bank's employees away one by one for interrogation, out of the corner of your eye you see an open air vent. If you were quick and subtle, you might be able to escape the guarded room you're trapped in, or even turn the tables on the terrorist attack.

Walkie talkie die hard, motherfucker.

This scenario does assume you have a wife, so I've put the Female tag on it, but I didn't see a good reason to make it MPov aside from that. Let me know if you think there are better tag options.

Dead dove warning: Violent action involving terrorists with submachine guns who will shoot to kill. Terrorists are very capable of hurting the hostages. The scenario probably won't actually be NTR if you go full on John McClane on everyone, and you're probably not just going to sit there and watch, right? Bruce Willis would be very disappointed in you.

Edit: a word on the intent. The original idea was for it to be a ludicrous, parodic exaggeration of a VRCat cheating bot where the wife/girlfriend is horny and trying to cheat in a way that is transparently ridiculous (hence the title). Then the whole die hard scenario came about because I think NTR bots are often very boring since they don't offer anything for {{user}} to actually do and also leave the cheating as a foregone conclusion - by adding a scenario where {{user}} is probably going to be separated from their wife for a time, not observing her directly, and providing an implicit goal for {{user}} to shoot for to rescue her & the other hostages (including an implied climax), it gives a chance for {{user}} to be a hero and leaves them with control over their destiny while retaining some tension about what's going on with Molly.

I've modified the bot a little since first posting as I think it's funnier if the hostages are the ones being sexually aggressive towards flustered and confused terrorists and I wasn't really going for anything angsty. I don't think I can quite justify putting the comedy tag back on there (which was on while I was writing it).
creator: richardmayfair
